title: [Deep Freeze, Cave of Ice]
description: On first glance, this chamber looks like the others -- until you notice a slick, icy pile of rocks against the far wall, and the frozen corpse slumped beside them.  Upon closer inspection, you discover that the ice-glazed body is frozen to the rocks themselves.  Nothing short of a thorough thaw will free the pitiful soul for a proper burial.

wayto.3476: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'north'
